details: repo_structure: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ are present, but reports/board/ is missing.

governance_contracts_present: reports/board/ is missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md, report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and spec files. reports/audit/ exists.

no_clawdbot_moltbot: moltbot/ directory exists at repo top-level with active Python files (sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py). scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py reference moltbot. scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py references clawdbot/moltbot. scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py references clawdbot/moltbot.
